biological_replicate: employing a MS-based approach with three biological replicates.
technical_replicate: the reaction system was composed of 1 μL cDNA template... with 3 replicates.
experimental_design: examined the transcriptional level of 9 known or putative protein glycosylation complex genes in a time-course of embryo germination.
factor_value: an N-glycosites mapping analysis of Nipponbare (Oryza sativa L. ssp japonica) embryos at 24 HPI.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
